_meta.description: Daily publish-hour schedule for zasupport.com blog. Publish hours derived from GSC click-through data. Refreshed weekly by gsc-traffic-analyser.js. Read by schedule-sanity-posts.js.
_meta.data_source: Recalibrated 24/05/2026 per docs/velocity-recalibration-2026-05-24.md after fix-28 + business-hub deployment

phase_0.reason: fix-28 priority; no new posts until leaked-post repair complete

phase_2.trigger_advance: GSC weekly impressions stable or rising

phase_5.trigger_advance: No SpamBrain warning, no manual action

phase_6.trigger_advance: monthly content audit clean, zero leaked

rationale.ceiling_change: Ground-truth sitemap (322 posts) vs prior estimate (94 posts) means authority surface 3.4x larger than originally modelled. SpamBrain 10x trigger sits at 25-30/day not 15-20/day for this site.
rationale.phase_pacing: GSC signal advance per phase, not calendar advance. If signal degrades, ramp pauses or reverses.
rationale.do_not_publish: Public SA holidays, Stage 4+ load shedding for the publish hour

do_not_publish.load_shedding_stage_4_plus: If Eskom announces Stage 4+ for an entire publish hour, defer to the next slot

monitoring.abort_on_red: Any red signal pauses ramp until investigated
